extortion.description: Mac Jee operates in the defense and aerospace segment. It currently comprises Mac Jee Defense, which is responsible for the development, production and marketing of defense systems; Mac Jee Tecnologia, which specializes in improving or creating energy products; and Equipaer, which is responsible for creating products and services for the aviation segment.We are ready to upload more than 16 GB of very essential corporate documents such as: NDA’s, contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, financial data (audits, payment details, reports) and as a dessert some rockets technical documentations.
